courses.title: Python Programming Fundamentals
courses.description: Master the basics of Python programming with hands-on projects and real-world examples.

courses.title: Advanced Web Development with React
courses.description: Build modern, responsive web applications using React. Learn hooks, state management, and deployment.

courses.title: Data Science Essentials
courses.description: Learn data analysis, visualization, and machine learning with Python. Includes real datasets.

courses.title: Cloud Computing with AWS
courses.description: Deploy, manage, and scale applications on Amazon Web Services. Covers EC2, S3, and Lambda.

courses.title: Mobile App Development with Flutter
courses.description: Create cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android using Flutter and Dart.
